data.body:
CHECKPOINT 4/6: Implementation complete ✓

Fixes applied to plugins/dso/agents/:
1. complexity-evaluator.md:52 — CONVERTED: python3 plugins/dso/scripts/blast-radius-score.py → .claude/scripts/dso blast-radius-score.py (executable script with shebang, use shim)
2. completion-verifier.md:88 — ANNOTATED: grep -rl search command using plugins/dso/scripts/ as a filesystem discovery path, not script invocation → added # shim-exempt: grep search path, not script invocation

Blocked (generated files, pre-edit hook blocked):
3. code-reviewer-light.md:243 — generated from plugins/dso/docs/workflows/prompts/reviewer-delta-light.md (owned by task 16a2-59a6)
4. code-reviewer-standard.md:244 — generated from plugins/dso/docs/workflows/prompts/reviewer-delta-standard.md (owned by task 16a2-59a6)

These 2 remaining violations require the sibling task (16a2-59a6) to fix the source fragments, then rebuild with build-review-agents.sh.
